final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: cinematic still, space exploration imagery
Primary request: astronaut floating in Earth orbit with stunning galaxy and nebula in background, partial space station structure at frame edge
Scene/backdrop: low Earth orbit, curved Earth horizon below, vast starfield with colorful nebula and Milky Way core, modular space station truss visible at periphery
Subject: astronaut in detailed EVA spacesuit, reflective visor showing Earth reflection, body in relaxed zero-gravity pose, suit fabric texture and joint mechanisms clearly visible
Style/medium: photorealistic digital art, NASA-style documentary photography
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, astronaut positioned off-center, Earth occupying lower third, cosmic background filling upper frame, slight Dutch angle for dynamism
Lighting/mood: soft blue-white Earthshine illuminating the suit from below, deep space blackness punctuated by distant stars, awe-inspiring and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: deep space black + vibrant blue-white Earth reflection + purple and pink nebula hues + metallic silver suit
Materials/textures: matte white spacesuit fabric with scuff marks, gold visor coating, metallic station components, smooth Earth atmosphere gradient
Constraints: maintain photorealistic suit details, Earth must show curvature and atmosphere glow
Avoid: cartoonish proportions, flat lighting, oversaturated colors, lens flare abuse, watermark
